title: Create: Simple Totem
description: Addon for the Create mod, makes it easy to craft totems of immortality
body:
The **addon** for the **Create** mod makes it easy to craft totems of immortality.

Create: [https://modrinth.com/mod/create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)

Craft is pronounced on a mechanical cravter.

Crafting requires:

![дж](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f6a0324ce5a4e03872bb9c7cea612c3ceb89e9d.png) Gold plates X2,

![ddd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e59ac2c5414807c301a2293feb3008b3e96d2154.png) Emeralds X2,

![fg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95c7bb9f133457578d0406a4254920fa7789fe15.png) Gold Wires X8

![craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eab2741deefd5dfb63340855551f95f3df86d97a.png)
